LanguageData.RTRS.ResetAllConfirm: This will reset all your changes to default values. Continue?
LanguageData.RTRS.NoFieldsAltars: Forbids all altars in the room. No additional fields.
LanguageData.RTRS.NoFieldsInstrument: Requires dance space around all musical instruments. No additional fields.
LanguageData.RTRS.ResetConfirm: Reset requirements for {0} to original values?
LanguageData.RTRS.InstrumentSpace_Desc: Requires free dance floor space in front of every musical instrument in the room.
LanguageData.RTRS.InstrumentSpace_Sizes: The game calculates a rectangular dance zone in front of each instrument. Size depends on type:
LanguageData.RTRS.InstrumentSpace_Rules: All cells in the zone must be: within the map, in the same room (not crossing walls/doors), and passable (no walls, doors, furniture, columns or other obstacles). If even one cell of any instrument is blocked or outside the room — the requirement fails for the entire room.
LanguageData.RTRS.PreceptsTooltip: If the pawn's ideoligion contains any of the listed precepts, this requirement is ignored for them. Requires Ideology DLC.
LanguageData.RTRS.DisablingPreceptsDesc: If the pawn's ideoligion contains any of these precepts, the requirement is disabled for them. Requires Ideology DLC.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Bedroom: A private room for sleeping and resting.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_ThroneRoom: A formal room where a noble holds court on their throne.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_DiningRoom: A room with a table for eating meals.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_RecRoom: A room with entertainment items for relaxation.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Hospital: A medical facility for treating the sick and injured.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_PrisonCell: A cell for holding a single prisoner.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_PrisonBarracks: A shared cell for holding multiple prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Barracks: A shared sleeping quarters for multiple colonists.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Tomb: A burial chamber for the dead.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Laboratory: A room for scientific research and experiments.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_WorshipRoom: A sacred room for religious ceremonies.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Nursery: A room for caring for infants and children.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Playroom: A room for children to play.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Classroom: A room for teaching and learning.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_ContainmentCell: A secure cell for containing entities.
LanguageData.RTRS.RoomDesc_Ballroom: A grand hall for dancing and social events.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredHumanBed_Desc: The room must contain at least one human-sized bed that is not medical and not assigned to prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_BedroomLogic_Desc: Beds must belong to members of the same family or couple. Children may sleep with parents.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredThrone_Desc: The room must contain at least one throne.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_MustBeIndoors_Desc: The room must be enclosed (not outdoors).
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredEatSurface_Desc: The room must contain at least one table or surface where pawns can eat.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredJoyGiver_Desc: The room must contain at least one item that provides joy.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredMedicalBed_Desc: The room must contain at least one medical bed not assigned to prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredPrisonerBed_Desc: The room must contain exactly one bed assigned to a prisoner.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredPrisonerBeds_Desc: The room must contain at least 2 beds assigned to prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredAnimalBed_Desc: The room must contain at least one bed for animals.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredHumanBeds_Desc: The room must contain at least 2 human beds that are not medical and not assigned to prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_NotBedroom_Desc: Beds must not belong to the same family or couple, otherwise the room counts as a bedroom.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredSarcophagus_Desc: The room must contain at least one sarcophagus.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredStorage_Desc: The room must contain at least one storage building (shelf, stockpile zone, etc.).
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredKitchen_Desc: The room must contain at least one work table that can produce edible food.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredWorkshop_Desc: The room must contain at least one work table with the Workshop role.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredLaboratory_Desc: The room must contain at least one work table with the Laboratory role.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredAltar_Desc: The room must contain at least one altar linked to the colony's ideoligion.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredChildBeds_Desc: The room must contain at least 2 small beds suitable for children.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenHumanBeds_Desc: The room must not contain any human-sized beds.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredBabyPlay_Desc: The room must contain at least one item that stimulates baby play.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredSchoolFurniture_Desc: The room must contain at least one school desk or blackboard.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredDeathrest_Desc: The room must contain at least one deathrest casket or deathrest-bindable item.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredEntityHolder_Desc: The room must contain at least one entity containment device.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredPsychicRitualSpot_Desc: The room must contain at least one psychic ritual spot.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenEntityHolder_Desc: The room must not contain entity holders such as sarcophagi or cryptosleep caskets.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenBeds_Desc: The room must not contain any beds.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenThrones_Desc: The room must not contain any thrones.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenWorkTables_Desc: The room must not contain any work tables.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_ForbiddenOtherWorkTableRole_De: If the room contains a work table, its role must match this room type.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredMusicalInstrument_Desc: The room must contain at least one musical instrument.
LanguageData.RTRS.Rule_RequiredArt_Desc: The room must contain at least 4 pieces of art (sculptures or paintings).
LanguageData.RTRS.BedDesc_HumanBed: Human-sized bed, not medical, not assigned to prisoners.
LanguageData.RTRS.BedroomLogicDesc: Beds must belong to members of the same family or couple. Children may sleep with parents. If beds belong to unrelated colonists, the room will not count as a bedroom.
LanguageData.RTRS.BarracksLogicDesc: Beds must NOT belong to members of the same family or couple. If all beds belong to one family, the room will be counted as a bedroom instead of barracks.
